preferences.paths.title: Configuration Paths
preferences.paths.description: Customize the configuration directories for Droid, OpenCode, Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes. Leave empty to use default paths.
preferences.paths.restartNote: Note: Changes to configuration paths may require restarting the application to take full effect.

droid.missions.title: Mission Settings
droid.missions.description: Configure models and reasoning effort for Mission mode workers. These settings are stored in missionModelSettings of your Factory settings.
droid.missions.workerModelDescription: Model used by feature workers during mission execution.
droid.missions.validationWorkerModelDesc: Model used by validation workers at milestone checkpoints.
droid.legacyVersions.title: Legacy Versions
droid.legacyVersions.autoUpdateHint: After downloading a legacy version, it's recommended to disable auto update to prevent it from being overwritten.
droid.helpers.title: Helpers
droid.helpers.envConflict.title: Environment Variable Conflict
droid.helpers.envConflict.description: If you're using Claude Code and encounter 401 errors with custom models, it may be caused by the ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN environment variable conflicting with your custom model's API key.
droid.helpers.envConflict.solution: Solution: Delete or comment out the ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN environment variable in your shell config file (e.g., ~/.zshrc, ~/.bashrc, or PowerShell profile), then restart your terminal or system.
droid.helpers.disableAutoUpdate.title: Try Disable Auto Update
droid.helpers.disableAutoUpdate.descript: Add FACTORY_DROID_AUTO_UPDATE_ENABLED=0 to your shell config file to disable Droid auto update.
droid.helpers.disableAutoUpdate.warning: This may not work in all cases. You need to restart your terminal and the app for changes to take effect.
droid.helpers.disableAutoUpdate.instruct: Add the following line to your shell config file:
droid.helpers.cloudSessionSync.title: Cloud Session Sync
droid.helpers.cloudSessionSync.descripti: When enabled, sessions will be automatically synced to the cloud
droid.helpers.sessionSettings.title: Session Settings
droid.helpers.sessionSettings.reasoningE: Controls how much structured thinking the model performs
Only applies to official Droid models, not BYOK custom models

droid.helpers.sessionSettings.showThinki: Display AI thinking/reasoning blocks in the main chat view
